rag_rules: Convert output_guarantee items into guarantee clauses using only visible input/output symbols.
Use the component's own visible identifiers—no subcomponent paths—in guarantee expressions.
generic_rules: Map requirement intent directly to AGREE clause type: guarantee for output claims.
Anchor all expressions in the component's public interface, not internal implementation details.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Only reference features that are visible at the component level.
anti_patterns: Do not embed implementation-specific subcomponent references in component-type annexes.
Do not introduce unnamed or derived symbols not present in the visible interface.
irrelevant_topics: assume, assign, eq, const, validator, repair, fusion, annex placement, traceability
